title: Teleport At
description: Lightweight and intuitive tpa mod for fabric servers.
body:
# Teleport At

Lightweight and intuitive tpa mod for fabric servers, no extras or any kind of bloat.
Perfect for small vanilla servers between friends, in order to have a nice and clean experience.

### Commands

- `/tpa <player>` requests a tp to the given player
- `/tpcancel` cancels the ongoing request
- `/tpaccept <player>` accepts the tp request for the given player 
- `/tpreject <player>` rejects the tp request for the given player
